title: Contact — Navendu Mishra MP
h1: Please get in touch with me using the details below.
text_excerpt: Contact — Navendu Mishra MP 0 Skip to Content Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up Folder: FAQs Back Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Please get in touch with me using the details below. I can only act on behalf of my own constituents. There is a strict parliamentary convention preventing MPs from taking up cases on behalf of constituents of other MPs. Your MP will be able to help you deal with an organisation wherever the organisation is based in the country. If you are unsure of who your MP is, you can check by visiting Find Your MP . Please include your full name, address and contact number in all correspondence. My office is located on the high street in the heart of Stockport - 102 Princes Street, Stockport, SK1 1RJ. It is important to me that I learn from my constituents their concerns and opinions. My office is generally open Monday to Friday and my team will deal with visitors between 10:00 hrs and 15:30 hrs. When there are staff absences or training taking place the office may be closed to the public. I hold regular advice surgeries in my office as well as coffee mornings and drop-ins across the different wards in Stockport. Should you wish to make an appointment please get in touch. Email: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Post: 102 Princes Street Stockport SK1 1RJ Telephone: 0161 480 0833 Social Media: Follow my work in Parliament for Stockport on Facebook . Get in touch: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Privacy Policy Disability Access Promoted by Hollie Ridley at 20 Rushworth Street, London, SE1 0RB
